rationale: Ground-truth concerns center on: whether the model should read cudagraph_mode (architecture placement), the TODO needing to flag mtp-seed non-reproducibility under batch>1, an NPU compilation_config fix, and requests for perf benchmarks. X's comment 4 independently surfaces the seed-reproducibility consequence and asks for an accuracy A/B, partially echoing gcanlin's point and the benchmark asks, while Y's findings pivot almost entirely to missing unit-test coverage, a concern absent from the human thread. Both correctly and independently flag the stale/contradictory yaml comments and the duplicate omni_pooler_payload_include_hidden assignment, and both are well-grounded with concrete file/line targets and actionable fixes. Precision and actionability are comparable, but X's slightly closer alignment with the actual reviewer concerns gives it the edge on recall.
